headline: Lite app praised for low data usage but plagued by bugs, missing features, and poor performance.
key_findings: Frequent crashes and error messages, especially after updates.
Performance issues: lag, slow loading, feed not refreshing, and split screen bugs.
Missing core features: dark mode, stories polls, video upload, reels, voice messages.
Appreciation for low data usage, simplicity, and good performance on low-end devices.
Bugs with emoji display, autoplay, and post ordering.
Requests for better navigation and smoother UI.
Mixed feedback on Reels: some users want it, others glad it's absent.
Need for stability and feature parity with the main app.
action_items: Fix crashes and error messages to improve stability.
Add dark/night mode as most requested feature.
Reduce lag and improve loading speed, especially for feeds and stories.
Implement missing features: stories polls, video upload, voice messages, and reels toggle.
Fix bugs: split screen issues, emoji squares, autoplay settings, and post ordering.
Improve navigation and feed refresh mechanism.
Add data saver mode and option to disable video autoplay.
Ensure compatibility with system emojis and proper display.
